channel.title: Craft
channel.description: Craft is a list of hand oriented craft and technology Do we really need all those power tools?

item.title: ‘17th-Century Essex County Cupboard’ to Prepress
item.description: I uploaded the interior files to our printer on Tuesday for Peter Follansbee’s latest book, “17th-Century Essex County Cupboard” – so by the time you read this, I hope we’re finalizing the cover. This one is a tour de force – a twice-in-a-lifetime project (though I’ll bet Peter wouldn’t mind making it again) that we...
item.source:markdown: I uploaded the interior files to our printer on Tuesday for Peter Follansbee’s latest book, “17th-Century Essex County Cupboard” – so by the time you read this, I hope we’re finalizing the cover. This one is a tour de force – a twice-in-a-lifetime project (though I’ll bet Peter wouldn’t mind making it again) that we...

item.title: As the River Flows
item.description:
Of all the “new” things I’ve tried with woodworking over the last few years, the most fascinating — and, more importantly, the most fun — is epoxy resin. Until now I’ve used it...

item.title: Powermatic Difference: Premium Woodworking Machines Built to Last
item.description:
For over a century, Powermatic has set the gold standard in woodworking machinery. Since 1921, the name Powermatic has represented precision, durability and pride in craftsmanship. In workshops and at...

Source

Since 1921, the name Powermatic has represented precision, durability and pride in craftsmanship. In workshops and at...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/sponsored-post/powermatic-difference-premium-woodworking-machines-built-to-last/)

item.title: New (More) Storefront Hours
item.description: Good news – we’re adding Tuesday hours to the storefront. Starting on March 24, the Lost Art Press store (407 Madison Ave., Covington, Ky., 40411) will be open from 10 a.m.-2 pm. every Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday and Friday. Kara Gebhart Uhl, author of “Cadi & the Cursed Oak” and Lost Art Press copy editor (among...
item.source:markdown: Good news – we’re adding Tuesday hours to the storefront. Starting on March 24, the Lost Art Press store (407 Madison Ave., Covington, Ky., 40411) will be open from 10 a.m.-2 pm. every Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday and Friday. item.title: Universal Slide Jig
item.description:

item.title: 18th-century Tools for Every Shop
item.description:
Often, the old ways are more efficient. I use 18th-century hand tools because I make reproduction furniture. In my mind, the simplest, most efficient way to make authentic-looking furniture is...

Source

I use 18th-century hand tools because I make reproduction furniture. In my mind, the simplest, most efficient way to make authentic-looking furniture is...

item.title: New Model Mandolin: 1
item.description:
No sooner one mandolin is complete than another comes along!

So, after a very long gestation period, my New Model Mandolin is finally being realised. In this first episode of a new build series of videos, I look at its overall shape and go into detail about the making of the external mould. The mould is used for accurate construction of the mandolin’s rim.
item.source:markdown:
No sooner one mandolin is complete than another comes along!
So, after a very long gestation period, my New Model Mandolin is finally being realised. In this first episode of a new build series of videos, I look at its overall shape and go into detail about the making of the external mould. The mould is used for accurate construction of the mandolin’s rim.
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (Gary Nava, Luthier)

item.description:

item.title: Charlie’s Legacy
item.description:
Furniture being deadly seems like such an unlikely threat, but tipping accidents happen by the thousands every year. Charlie Horn would be a young man in his early 20s today...

item.title: Simple Dovetailed Step Stool
item.description: This four-piece dovetailed step stool is a weekend class I sometimes teach – but unlike for most of my classes, it’s not a project I, er, borrowed from Chris or wrote about myself for a magazine article or book. It’s an excellent beginner’s dovetailing project, and you end up with a nice little stool that’s...
item.source:markdown: This four-piece dovetailed step stool is a weekend class I sometimes teach – but unlike for most of my classes, it’s not a project I, er, borrowed from Chris or wrote about myself for a magazine article or book. It’s an excellent beginner’s dovetailing project, and you end up with a nice little stool that’s...

item.title: Mind Upon Mind: Marking Octagons
item.description: Editor’s note: Our Mind Upon Mind series is a nod to a 1937 Chips from the Chisel column (also featured in “Honest Labour: The Charles H. Hayward Years”), in which Hayward wrote, “The influence of mind upon mind is extraordinary.” The idea being there’s often room for improvement. To that end, we’ve asked you what else you have...
item.source:markdown: Editor’s note: Our Mind Upon Mind series is a nod to a 1937 Chips from the Chisel column (also featured in “Honest Labour: The Charles H. Hayward Years”), in which Hayward wrote, “The influence of mind upon mind is extraordinary.” The idea being there’s often room for improvement. To that end, we’ve asked you what else you have...

item.title: New Video: Build a Welsh Lobsterpot Chair with Chris Williams
item.description: NOTE: This video is being offered at the introductory price of $30 for the first 30 days of its release. After that, it will be sold for the full price of $60. In this nearly two-hour video, professional chairmaker Chris Williams shows you how he builds a beautiful Welsh lobsterpot chair using simple tools and...

item.description:

item.title: 2 Stick Chairs for Sale from Kale & Chris
item.description: Today we offer two comfortable stick chairs for sale that Kale and I recently finished. As always, the price includes crating and shipping anywhere in the lower 48 states. Here are the details. The Bebb Chair, a Welsh Comb-back in Olive Ash This chair is my interpretation of one of my favorite Welsh stick chairs....
item.source:markdown: Today we offer two comfortable stick chairs for sale that Kale and I recently finished. As always, the price includes crating and shipping anywhere in the lower 48 states. item.title: Bevel Monkey & 1:4 Dovetail Template Back in Stock
item.description: Our machinist has been backed up on work for a while, so we’re delighted he found time to get done for us a run of Brass Bevel Monkeys and 1:4 Dovetail Templates. Get ’em while they’re (metaphorically) hot! – Fitz p.s. The combo 1:6/1:8 Dovetail Template is in the tumbling hopper, and scrapers are currently...
item.source:markdown: Our machinist has been backed up on work for a while, so we’re delighted he found time to get done for us a run of Brass Bevel Monkeys and 1:4 Dovetail Templates. Get ’em while they’re (metaphorically) hot! – Fitz p.s. The combo 1:6/1:8 Dovetail Template is in the tumbling hopper, and scrapers are currently...

item.title: Modern Makers of Moulding Planes
item.description: Many of my classes include the instruction to “just put a bead on it.” A bead on the edge of a board protects fragile corners from breaking off, because by rounding it over into a bead, said fragile edge is gone. A bead also creates a shadowline, which helps to make a gap (say, between...
item.source:markdown: Many of my classes include the instruction to “just put a bead on it.” A bead on the edge of a board protects fragile corners from breaking off, because by rounding it over into a bead, said fragile edge is gone. A bead also creates a shadowline, which helps to make a gap (say, between...

item.title: Make Fresh Milk Paint with the Author
item.description: Nick Kroll, the author of “Make Fresh Milk Paint,” is teaching a class on the process on April 29 at the Dictum classroom in Munich. You can read more about the course and sign up at Dictum’s website. Nick is a great teacher and an absolute fount of knowledge when it comes to making paint,...
item.source:markdown: Nick Kroll, the author of “Make Fresh Milk Paint,” is teaching a class on the process on April 29 at the Dictum classroom in Munich. You can read more about the course and sign up at Dictum’s website. Nick is a great teacher and an absolute fount of knowledge when it comes to making paint,...

item.description:
This unusual push stick provides fingertip control without risking your fingertips. Its V-notch end wraps around the board’s edge to hold the workpieces against both the table and the fence,...

item.title: Nava Electric Mandolin Part 5: Completed!
item.description:
The electric mandolin (e-mando) is now complete! In this video, I give a “guided tour” of the instrument and a demonstration of how the pick-up system works.

And a few photos below.........








Hope you like it!

Cheers Gary
item.source:markdown:
The electric mandolin (e-mando) is now complete! In this video, I give a “guided tour” of the instrument and a demonstration of how the pick-up system works.
And a few photos below.........
[![](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg_7fZVEcEnND_ATT2667ddIIxS4K1yDsghaFRn5nhxrEJ6Yz8ecVGOAPNc0x_37SWn3rgUkwOOUCZ8RZCRCgHNVNKRDoh-yETfDxbiOqUTMVdGIkHXEBmYQ-pARE3xmbYp-4a68yO-1TTPLmHLGBmfSPv_-okUeCzk0QLW6U-W6swx-TKVu8t7/w400-h225/1.JPG)](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg_7fZVEcEnND_ATT2667ddIIxS4K1yDsghaFRn5nhxrEJ6Yz8ecVGOAPNc0x_37SWn3rgUkwOOUCZ8RZCRCgHNVNKRDoh-yETfDxbiOqUTMVdGIkHXEBmYQ-pARE3xmbYp-4a68yO-1TTPLmHLGBmfSPv_-okUeCzk0QLW6U-W6swx-TKVu8t7/s1500/1.JPG)

[![](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg1Ruq2HOGP9Dsk6aIi4jFKym0UflVM1guW-IOPc3All5uM4YIeM3srx6uOSyYc4VJFoX7yHo3zlp2M4v_wuq_WVuEW6iQFARZMqr4O9HzWgmJ71nMhfmP9rhbdTjAJ9WPOLHLGFPOyYnrE0hew_2CoPGK8ltttZKL17uYngk4AnFkwtADafjRH/w400-h225/9.JPG)](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg1Ruq2HOGP9Dsk6aIi4jFKym0UflVM1guW-IOPc3All5uM4YIeM3srx6uOSyYc4VJFoX7yHo3zlp2M4v_wuq_WVuEW6iQFARZMqr4O9HzWgmJ71nMhfmP9rhbdTjAJ9WPOLHLGFPOyYnrE0hew_2CoPGK8ltttZKL17uYngk4AnFkwtADafjRH/s1500/9.JPG)
Hope you like it!
Cheers Gary
item.author: noreply@blogger.com (Gary Nava, Luthier)

item.title: Women in the Trades and the Shift Toward Purpose‑Built Workwear
item.description:
The growing number of women working in construction and the skilled trades is prompting a meaningful shift in how jobsite apparel is designed and evaluated. As their presence increases across...

Source
item.source:markdown:
![](https://media.popularwoodworking.com/app/uploads/2026/02/02095115/f652n_10b-copy-1024x683.jpg)The growing number of women working in construction and the skilled trades is prompting a meaningful shift in how jobsite apparel is designed and evaluated. As their presence increases across...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/article/women-in-the-trades-and-the-shift-toward-purpose%e2%80%91built-workwear/)

item.title: ShopNotes Podcast Episode 264 — Pretty, Hanging on a Wall
item.description:
In this week’s episode of the ShopNotes Podcast, John, Phil, and Logan dive deep into listener questions and comments with a look into starting out in wood turning and at-home...

Source
item.source:markdown:
![](https://media.popularwoodworking.com/app/uploads/2026/02/27135231/screenshot-2026-02-27-at-12.51.39pm-1024x1024.png)In this week’s episode of the ShopNotes Podcast, John, Phil, and Logan dive deep into listener questions and comments with a look into starting out in wood turning and at-home...
[Source](https://www.popularwoodworking.com/editors-blog/shopnotes-podcast-episode-264-pretty-hanging-on-a-wall/)

item.title: LAP Open Wire, February 28, 2026
item.description: Got a woodworking question or a query about what’s happening at Lost Art Press? It’s your lucky day – it’s time for Open Wire! You have until 5 p.m. Eastern to pose your question in the comments section below, and we’ll respond – hopefully with a informed and useful answer…but no promises on that front....
item.source:markdown: Got a woodworking question or a query about what’s happening at Lost Art Press? It’s your lucky day – it’s time for Open Wire! You have until 5 p.m. Eastern to pose your question in the comments section below, and we’ll respond – hopefully with a informed and useful answer…but no promises on that front....
